rationale: The citing paper studies IPO listing effects on product innovation behavior in U.S. CPG firms (difference-in-differences/fixed effects), whereas the cited paper examines CMO characteristics and VC funding hazard in very young high-tech ventures; these are substantially different questions, settings, and methods. The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference with no local citation context or textual signal of substantive reuse. Given this, the citation most likely serves as broad background in the marketing-finance literature rather than a core dependency.
